feature_tested: Sprint A-E: Echo Concierge, Echo Connect, FOH Operations, Retail Operations
summary: Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). All 4 new modules have working APIs. Frontend: Echo Connect panel opens with 10 channels and Directory tab. Echo Concierge toolbar button exists (data-testid='toolbar-echo-concierge'). FOH Operations and Retail Operations are in sidebar but panel opening needs verification.

integration_issues.issue: Toolbar button found but panel with data-testid='echo-concierge-panel' not detected after click - may be rendering issue or panel ID mismatch
Clicking 'Front of House' in sidebar opens Echo Connect channel instead of FOH Operations panel - sidebar item may be opening wrong module

endpoints: GET /api/concierge/dashboard - Returns kpis (active, resolved, sla_breaches, total_recovery_cost) + categories + recent tickets
GET /api/concierge/tickets - Returns 7+ seed tickets with room_number, category, priority, SLA
POST /api/concierge/tickets - Creates new ticket with SLA deadline auto-calculated (30 mins for high priority)
POST /api/concierge/tickets/{id}/recovery - Adds recovery action with cost tracking
GET /api/connect/channels/{id}/messages - Returns messages for a channel
POST /api/connect/messages - Sends a message to a channel
GET /api/connect/directory - Returns staff with first name only (no last names)
GET /api/foh/tip-pool - Returns distribution with per-point, per-person, per-hour calculations
POST /api/foh/tip-pool/what-if - Returns modified distribution based on scenario
GET /api/retail/dashboard - Returns 10 items, sales, low stock alerts

verified_elements: Echo Connect panel opens from sidebar with 10 channels
Echo Connect shows Channels and Directory tabs
Echo Connect channels include: Security & Safety, PM Shift, AM Shift, All Staff Announcements, Management, Housekeeping, Spa & Wellness, Engineering, Front of House, Culinary Team
Echo Connect channel messages display correctly (FOH Manager Sarah message visible)
Echo Connect message input and Send button present

Sidebar groups present: Dashboard & Overview, Culinary Operations, Financial & Purchasing, Events & Catering, Spa & Wellness, Engineering & Facilities, HR & Administration, AI & Integrations, Community & Support
Dashboard loads with Enterprise Command Center
not_verified: Echo Concierge panel tabs (Dashboard, All Tickets, Report Issue, Analytics)
FOH Operations panel (Floor & Staff, Tip Pool, Guest Feedback tabs)
Echo Concierge panel opening from toolbar

action_items: Verify Echo Concierge panel opens when toolbar button is clicked - may need to check panel registry or module loading
Verify FOH Operations panel opens from sidebar 'Front of House' item - currently opens Echo Connect channel instead
Verify Retail Operations panel opens from sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Backend APIs for all 4 modules are fully functional with proper seed data
Echo Concierge: 7 seed tickets with SLA timers, recovery cost tracking, room hotspots analytics
Echo Connect: 10 channels (department, group, shift, property types), first-name-only directory
FOH Operations: 20 tables, 7 servers, tip pool with what-if modeling
Retail Operations: 10 gift shop items, sales tracking, low stock alerts
Frontend modules exist at /app/client/modules/ with proper data-testid attributes
Sidebar.tsx has correct panel IDs: echo-connect, foh-operations, retail-ops
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds: 7 concierge tickets, 10 connect channels, 20 FOH tables, 7 servers, 10 retail items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 tested 4 new modules. Backend 100% working. Echo Connect frontend works. Echo Concierge toolbar button exists but panel opening needs verification. FOH Operations and Retail Operations sidebar items exist but panel opening needs verification. POS/GL/Email integrations remain MOCKED stubs.
